rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN MANHAN ET AL VS. SHANNON GALLAGHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission, Set One And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN MANHAN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission, Set One And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Defendant to provide complete verified code-complaint responses by 5:00 p.m. on March 5, 2019 to Requests 1,2,3,4, and 12. Objections to requests 1-13 are overruled. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,360 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel no later than March 15, 2019 by 5:00 p.m. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN MANHAN ET AL VS. SHANNON GALLAGHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Sanctions For Discovery Abuse
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN MANHAN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Sanctions For Discovery Abuse GRANTED as requested. Objections are overruled. Defendant to provide complete verified code-compliant responses no later than March 5, 2019 by 5:00 p.m. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,060 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel no later than March 15, 2019 by 5:00 p.m. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RATINUN SUPMITCHOTIMA VS. SHIRLEY CONWAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF RATINUN SUPMITCHOTIMA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS G STEWART VS. STEVEN J FITZPATRICK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Or Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF DENNIS STEWART'S motion For Order Or Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement GRANTED as follows: (1) the subject rental agreement is forfeited and terminated; (2) Plaintiff is entitled to back rent and daily damages in the amount of $8,319.24; (3) Plaintiff is entitled to the costs of suit in the amount of $320 (filing fees for initial filing, posting and mailing, this motion); the Court notes that there is no explanation provided for the $997 statement of costs listed Leadbetter Declaration or for $2,621.65 demanded in costs on the proposed judgment; and (4) Plaintiff is entitled to $950 in reasonable attorney's fees incurred in enforcement of the Settlement pursuant to paragraphs 4(F) and (G) of the stipulation. Complaint did not seek any attorney's fees pursuant to the Lease agreement for the prosecution of the action. See paragraph 17d of complaint. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: G. PAUL BOSCHETTI VS. QI CHENG KAI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT QI CHENG KAI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: INNO EKEH DR. VS. ESTHELA JUAREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 04, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT ESTHELA JUAREZ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Defendant and defendant's counsel are ordered to comply with all procedural requirements of CCP, CRC and Local Rules in the future. = (501/CFH)
